questions.text: Design a go-to-market plan to launch Stripe Issuing in Brazil.
How would you position an enterprise AI assistant against a well-funded incumbent with deeper brand recognition?
You inherit a product with strong technical reviews but stalling sign-ups. What is the first thing you investigate?
How would you reach a target audience for a new B2B product with zero marketing budget?
Walk me through how you would design pricing for a product entering a category dominated by a free-tier incumbent.
Pick a Meta product you use. What are the three most important metrics for it, and why?
Design a launch plan for a developer-focused product that needs to win the technical decision-maker first.
Walk me through a campaign you have run end to end. What was your hypothesis, what did you measure, and what would you change next time?
How would you structure a multi-channel campaign for a product launch with a six-week runway?
You have one million dollars to drive enterprise pipeline next quarter. How do you allocate it?
How do you define an ICP, and how do you sharpen it once you have real customer data?
What is the difference between brand and demand, and how would you split a budget between them for an early-stage SaaS company?
Walk me through how you would set up an attribution model for a B2B product with long sales cycles.
Two channels show contradictory performance signals. How do you decide which one to trust?
How do you decide when to invest in content marketing versus paid acquisition?
Describe a campaign you ran that underperformed. What did you learn?
Walk me through how you would write a launch email for a new feature that 90 percent of customers will not use.
Tell me about a time you had to pivot a campaign mid-flight based on early data.
Tell me about a time you overruled a stakeholder on a creative decision. How did it land?
Tell me about a time you partnered with a product team on a launch. What worked and what did not?
Describe a time you had to translate a complex technical product into a clear message for a non-technical buyer.
What is CAC payback period, and what is a healthy benchmark for an early-stage SaaS company?
Explain the difference between MQL, SQL, and PQL. Which one is most useful for your team and why?
Walk me through how you would diagnose a sudden drop in conversion on the pricing page.
What is the role of marketing in influencing product retention, not just acquisition?
